blittermib. Pixelperfect MIB browser
Self-hosted — your MIBs never leave your server. ⌘⇧K
IF-MIB › ifTable

ifTable

A list of interface entries.

1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2
SEQUENCE OF IfEntry · not-accessible · current

Description

A list of interface entries. The number of entries is given by the value of ifNumber.

Columns

#ColumnSyntaxAccessStatus
1ifIndex indexInterfaceIndexread-onlycurrent
10ifInOctets Counter32read-onlycurrent
blittermib · runs entirely on your server Made with AI and ❤️ for Open Source in Europe · About Me · Imprint · Privacy

Decode an SNMP walk

Drop a .txt capture here, or paste above.

The walk is parsed in memory and never written to disk, logged, or stored. Captures are capped at 10 MB (roughly 70–100k OIDs); for larger walks, filter or split before upload.
